top_patterns.description: Opens with a brief thought or observation, often personal or reflective.
top_patterns.when_it_appears: Throughout, especially in casual, reflective posts.
example_quotes: Hope he does not sleep walk :)

top_patterns.description: Shares an activity or event with a tone of excitement or gratitude.
top_patterns.when_it_appears: In posts about trips, milestones, or achievements.
example_quotes: Made the grand Teton summit in one day. Now I just have to get down. I love you all!
Early flight this morning for a big day!

top_patterns.description: Expresses gratitude or invites engagement, often with a personal note.
top_patterns.structure_template: Personal reflection + call to action or gratitude
top_patterns.when_it_appears: In birthday, memorial, or community posts.
example_quotes: Yesterday we lost Charlie Lang, heather's grandpa and a dear friend to me. I am so thankful I got to celebrate his 90th b day with him.
My b day wish: that this world knows how much I love it. carpe diem

archetypal_structures.emotional_job: Share personal reflections or insights in a casual, approachable way.
example_quotes: Hope he does not sleep walk :)

archetypal_structures.emotional_job: Celebrate milestones or activities with enthusiasm.
example_quotes: Made the grand Teton summit in one day. Now I just have to get down. I love you all!
Early flight this morning for a big day!

archetypal_structures.formula: Personal story or reflection + gratitude or invitation
archetypal_structures.emotional_job: Express thankfulness or invite engagement around personal moments.
example_quotes: Yesterday we lost Charlie Lang, heather's grandpa and a dear friend to me.
My b day wish: that this world knows how much I love it.

openers: Hope he does not sleep walk :)
bridge_phrases: What do u see in the mirror?
language_habits.sentence_length_profile: Mostly short, punchy sentences, often 5-15 words.
language_habits.line_break_style: Occasional line breaks for emphasis, especially in personal or reflective posts.

example_quotes: Hope he does not sleep walk :)
Made the grand Teton in one day.
We love you and will miss you.

anti_patterns: Generic motivational quotes without personal touch
Lack of personal insight or reflection

synthesis_notes.what_this_batch_says_about_current_voice: Blake's current style is casual, reflective, and emotionally open, emphasizing personal stories and achievements.
synthesis_notes.what_changed_vs_older_voice: Shift toward more personal reflection and gratitude, less promotional or generic.
